## Checklist

- [ ] No new `dependencies` added (or, if one was, the summary explains why it's justified)
- [ ] Any new cost/token figure is labeled `actual`/`estimate`/`mixed` — never bare (see `docs/specs/cost-schema.md`)
- [ ] Docs updated in this PR if behavior changed (README, `docs/USAGE_GUIDE.md`, or the relevant `docs/specs/*.md`) — not deferred to a follow-up
- [ ] If this is an architecturally significant decision, an ADR is included (`docs/adr/template.md`)
